steps.text: Identify client goals, role (disclosing vs. receiving), and any known business context for the NDA clause under review
Analyze the confidentiality-sharing language (who Recipient may share with, conditions, and controls) from the disclosing party’s perspective and propose protective redlines
Analyze the term/duration and governing law language from the disclosing party’s perspective and propose protective redlines
Run a quick risk/consistency check against the contract-review checklist (ambiguity, one-sidedness, enforceability, missing protections) and refine redlines
Draft the concise written output: issue-spotting summary, specific suggested redlines with explanations, and attorney-review disclaimer, marking any open business points as [CONFIRM WITH CLIENT]
